title: Susan Scuppernong
content:
Silly Susan Scuppernong
     Cried so hard and cried so long,
     People asked her what was wrong.

     She replied, "I do not know
     Any reason for my woe - 
     I just feel like feeling so."
meaning:
Arthur Macy's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Susan Scuppernong"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
